about.subtitle: About Us
about.desc: As Ucuzler Building Management, we combine technology and transparency to ensure peace and order in your living spaces. We manage legal and financial processes with our expert staff, leaving you only the comfort of living.

footer.desc: Transparent, reliable building management in Kayseri. No pool system, each site's money in its own account.
footer.socialDesc: Follow us for updates and announcements.
footer.freeDiscoveryDesc: Let us inspect your building for free and prepare a custom quote.

kvkkPage.subtitle: Legal Notice
kvkkPage.intro: As Ucuzler Building Management, we attach the utmost importance to the security, confidentiality and lawful processing of your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK").
kvkkPage.sec1Desc: Ucuzler Building Management, located at Sahabiye Neighborhood Ahmet Pasha Street Kalender Business Center 41/10, acts as the "Data Controller" within the scope of KVKK, and your personal data is processed within the limits explained in this Clarification Text.
kvkkPage.sec2Desc: Your personal data is processed by our company for the purpose of fully performing the management services we provide. Our main processing purposes are:
sec2Items: Managing collection processes for dues and expense advances
Ensuring the security of buildings, sites and business centers
Fulfilling legal and financial obligations completely
Improving service quality for our residents and ensuring communication
kvkkPage.sec3Desc: Pursuant to Article 11 of KVKK, as a data subject, you have the following legal rights:
sec3Items: Learning whether personal data is processed
If processed, requesting information about it
Learning the purpose of processing and whether it is used appropriately
Requesting correction of incomplete or incorrectly processed data
Requesting deletion of data in accordance with the law
Objecting to analyses made through automated systems

home.missionDesc: "Meeting the needs of residents quickly and effectively; managing accounting, cleaning, and technical processes professionally."
home.visionDesc: "To be an exemplary brand in building and site management in Turkey with transparent, reliable, and technological solutions."
home.apsDesc1: We put an end to the 'Pool System' risk in the sector. We create independent accounts for each site without a pool system, directing your dues straight to your site's special account.
home.apsDesc2: Ucuzler Building Management allows you to track everything transparently with the industry-leading Apsiyon infrastructure. Every data point from accounting reports to technical fault tracking is at your fingertips.
home.refDesc: With years of experience, we bring trust and transparency to thousands of households. Regardless of the building name, we leave our signature of quality in every shared living space we touch. Because for us, it's not buildings that matter most, but the families living peacefully inside them.
home.steps1Desc: We inspect your building on-site and identify shortcomings.
home.steps2Desc: We prepare the annual operating project and budget.
home.steps3Desc: We connect your site to the Apsiyon system and bank accounts.
home.steps4Desc: We begin managing all processes 24/7 transparently.
home.newsDesc: Latest news and projects from Ucuzler Management.
home.faqDesc: Answers to your questions about our building management and transparency processes.

hizmetler.title: Fast Online Payment
hizmetler.short: Residents can securely pay their dues and other payments 24/7 via our online system.

hizmetler.title: Accounting & Dues
hizmetler.short: Your financial processes are under full control with income-expense reports and transparent accounting.

hizmetler.title: Tech Maintenance
hizmetler.short: Plumbing, electrical, and general building repairs are carried out professionally by our expert teams.

hizmetler.title: Environment & Clean
hizmetler.short: Common areas and stairs are cleaned daily according to hygiene standards.

hizmetler.title: Landscape & Garden
hizmetler.short: Periodic maintenance of green spaces, tree pruning, and landscaping are done meticulously.

hizmetler.title: Mobile Staff Services
hizmetler.short: We offer professional auditing by making regular visits to your buildings with our mobile teams.

hizmetler.title: Meter Reading & Bill
hizmetler.short: Water, electricity, and gas meters are read flawlessly and billed transparently.

hizmetler.title: Building Trash Pickup
hizmetler.short: Household waste is regularly collected from floors and disposed of hygienically.

hizmetler.title: Legal Counseling
hizmetler.short: We offer professional legal processes and counseling within the scope of the Condominium Law.

faqs.a: Dues are calculated transparently based on the building's annual operating project, personnel expenses, common area energy costs, and planned maintenance budgets.

faqs.q: Where can I see my debts?
faqs.a: You can review your current debt status 24/7 via the Apsiyon app and pay securely with a credit card.

faqs.q: Who to contact for an emergency?
faqs.a: By calling our 24/7 support line or creating a 'Fault Report' from the mobile app, you can ensure fast professional intervention.
Detailed monthly income-expense tables and bank statements are published digitally on the resident panel in the first week of the following month.

home.blogDesc: Useful information about building management, legal rights, and legislation.
